global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with free shipping and a call to action.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient fills the background, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Flash sale live
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Flash sale live' prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: A simple outline of two boxes, representing a product, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Product image
elements.description: Another simple outline of a box, slightly overlapping with the first, indicating a product offering.

elements.label: Free shipping text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Free shipping over $25'.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A bold white text displaying the price '€19.99' located below the body text.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent black button with white text saying 'Claim reward' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: CrispBox logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'CrispBox' in a clean font.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Free shipping over $25 €19.99 Claim reward

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A subtle design element that adds visual interest without detracting from the main message.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, flash sale, free shipping, claim reward
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, product images are centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
